text: API Gateway - 707 @ wtenntin @ s ¢ Create and manage APIs * Endpoint/entry-point for applications e Sits between applications & integrations (services) ¢ Highly available, scalable, handles authorisation, throttling, caching, CORS, transformations, OpenAPI spec, direct integration and much more ¢ Can connect to services/endpoints in AWS or on-premises ¢ HTTP APIs, REST APIs and WebSocket APIs
